home.mobile-desc: Customers scan a QR code at their table and order directly from their phone. No app installation needed.
home.instant-desc: Kitchen staff receives orders instantly and can update status in real-time. Customers see when their food is ready.
home.dashboard-desc: Manage menus, tables, staff, and track orders from a single, intuitive admin dashboard.
home.secure-desc: Bank-grade security for all transactions and data. Your restaurant's information stays safe.
home.management-desc: Manage staff roles, permissions, and activities with our comprehensive staff management system.
home.growth-desc: Scale from a single table to multiple restaurants with our flexible and powerful platform.
home.step1-desc: Each table has a unique QR code that customers scan with their phone to access the menu.
home.step2-desc: Customers browse the menu, customize items, and submit their order directly from their device.
home.step3-desc: Kitchen staff instantly receives the order with all customizations and can prioritize accordingly.
home.step4-desc: Customers receive live updates on their order status, improving satisfaction and reducing inquiries.
home.description: Empower your restaurant with modern QR code ordering, real-time kitchen management, and staff control. No monthly fees. No hidden charges. Coming very soon.
home.free-badge: ✓ 100% Free • ✓ Forever • ✓ No credit card • ✓ No hidden fees
home.faster-ordering-desc: Customers order from their phones in seconds. No waiting for staff, no miscommunications.
home.increase-revenue-desc: Shorter ordering time means faster table turnover. Higher bill values through upselling in the app.
home.happy-staff-desc: Less time taking orders means more time for genuine service and building customer relationships.
home.real-time-insights-desc: Track what's selling, peak hours, and customer preferences with comprehensive analytics dashboard.
home.secure-payments-desc: Bank-grade security for all transactions. Customers pay through their preferred methods.
home.scale-easily-desc: From single tables to multiple restaurants. Grow without worrying about system limits.
home.no-app-download: No app download needed. One scan and they're viewing your menu.
home.beautiful-menu: Beautiful menu with photos, descriptions, and all available options.
home.secure-checkout: Secure checkout with multiple payment methods. No separate bill request.
home.orders-print-instantly: Orders print instantly in kitchen. Customers see real-time order status.
home.qr-order-desc: Customers scan a QR code and access the full menu instantly. No app installation, no friction.
home.smart-menu-desc: Upload photos, set prices, manage variants, mark items unavailable—all with a single click.
home.menu-desc-short: Create, update, and manage your restaurant menu with images, descriptions, food options, and pricing.
home.table-desc-short: Organize tables, track occupancy, and manage seating arrangements efficiently with real-time updates.
home.staff-desc-short: Manage staff roles, permissions, activity logs, and staff performance tracking with role-based access.
home.kitchen-desc-short: Live kitchen dashboard with real-time order tracking, status updates, and kitchen staff operations.
home.coupons-desc: Built-in coupon system to drive sales, manage discounts, and track promotional effectiveness.
home.staff-mgmt-desc: Role-based access control. Admin, staff, and kitchen roles with activity logging and permissions.
home.kitchen-display-desc: Real-time order queue optimized for kitchen screens. Update status and keep customers informed.
home.business-analytics-desc: Track revenue, popular items, peak hours, table performance, and make data-driven decisions.
home.promotions-desc: Create discounts, run campaigns, and drive repeat business with built-in coupon management.
home.secure-pay-desc: Customers pay directly from their phones. Multiple payment methods, bank-level security.
home.products-intro: Everything you need to run your restaurant efficiently, from customer ordering to kitchen operations to business insights.
home.title: Modern QR Restaurant Ordering
home.waitlist-desc: Be among the first restaurants to experience modern QR ordering. Join our waitlist for exclusive early access—completely free.
home.waitlist-note: ✓ No spam • ✓ Free forever • ✓ Early access to beta features
home.connect-whatsapp: Or connect with us directly: Message us on WhatsApp
home.hero-tagline: is an All‑in‑One Restaurant Management System
home.hero-mission: We aim to digitise all restaurant operations to provide efficiency and transparency within the industry.
home.who-intro: Chuio is your one-stop-shop to manage your restaurant with a fully digitised system for both your daily operations and customer relations.
home.who-sub: From start to finish, we offer you a fully integrated package all under one platform.
home.carousel-0-desc: This is where the staff and/or customer manages the food order. We provide a flexible and widely customisable menu for you to edit as you see fit.
home.carousel-1-desc: Upload photos, set prices, manage variants and control item availability — all in one place.
home.carousel-2-desc: Visualise your floor plan, manage sessions, reservations and occupancy at a glance.
home.carousel-3-desc: Customers scan a QR code, browse the full menu, and complete payment on their phone directly — no app download needed.
home.carousel-4-desc: Role-based access for admin, staff and kitchen with activity logging and PIN control.
home.carousel-5-desc: Real-time order display optimised for kitchen screens. Update status instantly.
home.carousel-6-desc: Works seamlessly across devices — from iPads to phones, everywhere in your restaurant.
home.carousel-7-desc: Track revenue, popular items, peak hours and table performance with detailed reports.
home.free-sub: We don't charge anything other than processing payments. Please see the table below for details:
home.rates-visa-local: Visa / Mastercard / Apple Pay / Google Pay (Local)
home.rates-visa-overseas: Visa / Mastercard / Apple Pay / Google Pay (Overseas)
home.everything-needed: Everything you need to run your restaurant
home.table-mgmt-desc: Organize tables by category, track occupancy, set seat capacity, and automatically generate unique QR codes for every table.
home.contact-subtitle: Let us show you how Chuio can transform your restaurant. Fill in your details and we'll contact you to arrange a demo at your store.

form.note: We'll contact you within 24 hours to schedule your personalized demo.
products.hero-description: Everything from QR ordering to kitchen operations to business intelligence. All features coming soon—completely free forever.
products.title: Chuio Products
products.subtitle: Complete Restaurant Management & Ordering Solutions
products.qr-order-desc: Customers scan QR codes at their table to instantly access the digital menu and place orders directly from their phone.
products.qr-desc: Customers scan the QR code at their table to instantly access your digital menu. No app installation needed, frictionless - just seamless ordering from any smartphone.
products.one-tap-desc: - QR code instantly opens menu, no navigation needed
products.table-id-desc: - Each QR is unique, system knows exactly which table ordered
products.customize-qr-desc: - Generate new QR codes anytime with one click
products.qr-scan-desc: Customers simply scan the QR code at their table to instantly access the digital menu and place orders directly from their phone.
products.smart-ordering-desc: Our intuitive mobile-first interface guides customers through a smooth ordering process with real-time feedback and clear item descriptions.
products.smart-customize: ✓ Customize items with food choices & options
products.create-items-desc: Easily create new food items with detailed information, images, pricing, and availability status. Add categories and organize your menu effortlessly.
products.edit-variants-desc: Manage customizable food options like size, toppings, and extra ingredients. Set prices for each combination and track inventory.
products.edit-variant-groups: ✓ Create food choice groups (size, toppings, extras)
products.edit-variant-pricing: ✓ Set prices for each food choice
products.organize-tables-desc: Efficiently manage all tables in your restaurant. Track table occupancy, assign dining capacity, and monitor active sessions in real-time.
products.tables-qr: ✓ Generate unique QR codes per table
products.staff-roles-desc: Manage your team with role-based access control. Assign staff members to different roles and track their activities and performance.
products.staff-roles: ✓ Create admin, staff, and kitchen roles
products.live-kitchen-desc: Powerful kitchen display system for real-time order management. Kitchen staff can view incoming orders, update order status, and manage the cooking workflow efficiently.
products.step1-desc: Customer scans the QR code at their table using their phone camera
products.step2-desc: Browse the complete digital menu with photos, descriptions, and prices
products.step3-desc: Select items, customize with food choices, and add to cart
products.step4-desc: Review order total, apply coupons, and complete payment securely
products.step5-desc: Watch real-time order status from pending to preparation to ready
products.step6-desc: Staff delivers order to table when ready, customer enjoys their meal
products.benefit-mobile-desc: Optimized for smartphones and tablets with responsive design
products.benefit-fast-desc: Quick loading times and stable performance for every customer
products.benefit-manage-desc: Simple menu management, pricing, and inventory controls
products.benefit-orders-desc: Kitchen receives orders instantly with full details and food customizations
products.benefit-promos-desc: Built-in coupon system to drive sales and customer loyalty
products.benefit-analytics-desc: Detailed order history and sales tracking for better insights
products.smart-menu-desc: Create and manage your entire menu with beautiful images, detailed descriptions, and flexible pricing. Add variants like sizes, toppings, and extra options. Update items in real-time without restarting anything.
products.photo-uploads-desc: - High-quality images for every menu item
products.variant-mgmt-desc: - Size, toppings, sauces, and more with dynamic pricing
products.instant-updates-desc: - Disable sold-out items immediately, no app refresh needed
products.category-org-desc: - Group items logically for easy browsing
products.table-mgmt-desc: Organize your restaurant layout, set table capacity, and track which tables are occupied. Monitor active dining sessions and automatically generate unique QR codes for every table.
products.table-categories: ✓ Table categories - Indoor, Patio, Bar - organize by location
products.real-time-occupancy-desc: - See which tables are active and how long they've been dining
products.auto-qr-desc: - One click to create QR codes for all tables
products.staff-mgmt-desc: Create staff accounts with role-based permissions. Admin, staff, and kitchen roles with PIN-based authentication for kitchen staff. Track activity and monitor performance.
products.three-role-types-desc: - Admin, staff, kitchen with specific permissions
products.pin-auth-desc: - 6-digit PIN for quick kitchen staff login
products.activity-logging-desc: - Track who did what and when
products.perf-analytics-desc: - See which staff members are most active
products.kds-desc: Powerful kitchen dashboard optimized for displaying orders. Kitchen staff sees incoming orders in real-time, can update order status, and manage cooking workflow efficiently.
products.realtime-order-queue-desc: - Orders appear instantly as they're placed
products.full-item-details-desc: - View all customizations, variants, and special requests
products.status-management-desc: - Update orders as pending, preparing, ready, or completed
products.feature-ui-desc: Modern, clean interface that's intuitive and easy to navigate
products.feature-sync-desc: Orders sync instantly between customer device and kitchen display
products.feature-secure-desc: Data encryption and secure payment processing for customer protection
products.feature-multi-desc: Support multiple restaurant locations with isolated data and staff management
products.feature-staff-desc: Role-based access for admins, staff, and kitchen personnel
products.feature-scale-desc: Grow from one location to many without changing infrastructure
products.cta-desc: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Chuio to streamline their operations
products.ready-transform-desc: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Chuio to streamline operations and delight customers.
products.benefit-faster-desc: Reduce order time from 5-10 minutes to under 2 minutes. More orders per table, higher revenue.
products.benefit-revenue-desc: Customers spend more time browsing and tend to order more. Analytics show 15-30% revenue increase.
products.benefit-staff-desc: Staff spends less time taking orders, more time providing exceptional service and building relationships.
products.benefit-data-desc: Real-time analytics on what sells, when peaks occur, and which items to promote.
products.benefit-marketing-desc: Promote items, run seasonal specials, and manage coupons all from one dashboard.
products.benefit-secure-desc: Bank-level security, automatic backups, and 99.9% uptime guarantee.
products.analytics-revenue-desc: Track daily revenue, peak hours, average bill size, and revenue by table to identify your top performers.
products.analytics-menu-desc: See which items are bestsellers, which variants are most popular, and optimize your menu for profitability.
products.analytics-perf-desc: Average table duration, ordering time, kitchen prep time, and table turnover rates to optimize operations.
products.analytics-customer-desc: Understand customer preferences, ordering patterns, and identify opportunities to increase order value.
products.analytics-reports-desc: Generate reports by date range, filter by table or menu category, export data for further analysis.
products.analytics-promo-desc: Track coupon usage, measure effectiveness, and see which promotions drive the most orders.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1-intro: At Chuio, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our restaurant management platform and services.
privacy.section2-1-item1: Restaurant name, address, and contact details
privacy.section2-2-item1: Administrator and staff names and contact information
privacy.section2-2-item4: Activity logs for security and compliance
privacy.section2-3-item3: Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
privacy.section3-item1: To provide and maintain the Chuio platform
privacy.section3-item2: To process orders and manage restaurant operations
privacy.section3-item3: To improve our services and develop new features
privacy.section3-item4: To send administrative messages and updates
privacy.section3-item6: To detect and prevent fraud or security issues
privacy.section4-intro: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
privacy.section4-item1: SSL/TLS encryption for data in transit
privacy.section4-item2: AES-256 encryption for sensitive data at rest
privacy.section4-item3: Regular security audits and penetration testing
privacy.section4-item5: Compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and local data protection regulations
privacy.section5-text: We retain your data for as long as necessary to provide our services. You can request deletion of your data at any time, subject to legal and business requirements.
privacy.section6-intro: We may share limited information with trusted third-party service providers for:
privacy.section6-confidentiality: All third parties are bound by confidentiality agreements.
privacy.section7-item4: Export your data in a portable format
privacy.section8-intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
privacy.section9-text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through our platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1-text: By accessing and using Chuio's restaurant management platform and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.section2-intro: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Chuio's platform for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
terms.section2-item2: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
terms.section2-item3: Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on the platform
terms.section2-item4: Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
terms.section2-item5: Transfer the materials to another person or "mirror" the materials on any other server
terms.section2-item6: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of the platform
terms.section3-text: The materials on Chuio's platform are provided on an 'as is' basis. Chuio makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.section4-text: In no event shall Chuio or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Chuio's platform.
terms.section5-text: The materials appearing on Chuio's platform could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Chuio does not warrant that any of the materials on its platform are accurate, complete, or current. Chuio may make changes to the materials contained on its platform at any time without notice.
terms.section6-text: Chuio has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its platform and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by Chuio of the site. Use of any such linked website is at the user's own risk.
terms.section7-text: Chuio may revise these terms of service for its platform at any time without notice. By using this platform, you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.
terms.section8-text: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Hong Kong, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.
terms.section9-item1: Provide accurate information when creating your account
terms.section9-item2: Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials
terms.section9-item3: Use the platform only for lawful purposes
terms.section9-item4: Not engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the platform
terms.section9-item5: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
terms.section10-text: Chuio strives to maintain 99.5% uptime for the platform. However, Chuio does not guarantee uninterrupted service and is not liable for downtime or service interruptions.
terms.section11-item1: Monthly subscription fees are due on the specified billing date
terms.section11-item2: Failure to pay may result in service suspension
terms.section11-item3: Refunds are subject to our refund policy available upon request
terms.section11-item4: Price changes will be communicated 30 days in advance
terms.section12-text: Chuio reserves the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these Terms of Service or for any reason without prior notice. Upon termination, your right to use the platform will immediately cease.
terms.section13-intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

settings.search-hint: Tap 'Scan Devices' to search for nearby Bluetooth devices
settings.static-table-desc: Each table has a fixed QR code. Only one active session per table. After closing, the same QR can be used by the next customer.
settings.static-seat-desc: Each seat has its own QR code (e.g. T01A, T01B). When starting a new order, select which seats have guests. Guests at different seats of the same table share the same order.
settings.regenerate-desc: A new QR code is generated for each order. Old codes expire when closed. Suitable for restaurants that print QR codes on receipts or table cards.
settings.item-status-desc: When enabled, customers can see the preparation status of their items on the QR menu page
settings.qr-share-desc: Share these QR codes with your staff to let them log in without an admin account.
settings.tap-view-hint: Tap buttons above to view QR codes and share with your staff.
settings.staff-qr-desc: Table staff can scan this code to access the staff interface. Each staff member uses their own PIN.
settings.kitchen-qr-desc: Kitchen staff can scan this code to access the kitchen dashboard. Each staff member uses their own PIN.
